identity.c(3) Library Functions Manual identity.c(3)

NAME

identity.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t acds_identity_generate (uint8_t public_key[32], uint8_t secret_key[64])
asciichat_error_t acds_identity_load (const char *path, uint8_t public_key[32], uint8_t secret_key[64])
asciichat_error_t acds_identity_save (const char *path, const uint8_t public_key[32], const uint8_t secret_key[64])
void acds_identity_fingerprint (const uint8_t public_key[32], char fingerprint[65])
asciichat_error_t acds_identity_default_path (char *path_out, size_t path_size)

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t acds_identity_default_path (char * path_out, size_t path_size)

Definition at line 120 of file identity.c.

120                                                                                {
121   if (!path_out || path_size == 0) {
122     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "path_out cannot be NULL and path_size must be > 0");
123   }
124 
125   // Get platform-specific config directory (~/.config/ascii-chat/ or %APPDATA%\ascii-chat\)
126   char *config_dir = platform_get_config_dir();
127   if (!config_dir) {
128     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to get config directory");
129   }
130 
131   // Append "acds_identity" to config directory
132   int written = safe_snprintf(path_out, path_size, "%sacds_identity", config_dir);
133   SAFE_FREE(config_dir);
134 
135   if (written < 0 || (size_t)written >= path_size) {
136     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Path buffer too small");
137   }
138 
139   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
140 }




References platform_get_config_dir(), and
    safe_snprintf().


Referenced by discovery_session_create().






void
  acds_identity_fingerprint (const uint8_t public_key[32], char
  fingerprint[65])


Definition at line 103 of file identity.c.


103                                                                                    {
104   if (!public_key || !fingerprint) {
105     log_error("acds_identity_fingerprint: NULL parameters");
106     return;
107   }
108 
109   // Compute SHA256 hash of public key
110   uint8_t hash[32];
111   crypto_hash_sha256(hash, public_key, 32);
112 
113   // Convert to hex string
114   for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) {
115     safe_snprintf(&fingerprint[i * 2], 3, "%02x", hash[i]);
116   }
117   fingerprint[64] = '\0';
118 }






References safe_snprintf().


Referenced by acds_main(), and
    discovery_session_create().






asciichat_error_t
  acds_identity_generate (uint8_t public_key[32], uint8_t
  secret_key[64])


Definition at line 17 of file identity.c.


17                                                                                          {
18   if (!public_key || !secret_key) {
19     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "public_key and secret_key cannot be NULL");
20   }
21 
22   // Generate Ed25519 keypair using libsodium
23   if (crypto_sign_keypair(public_key, secret_key) != 0) {
24     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Failed to generate Ed25519 keypair");
25   }
26 
27   log_debug("Generated new Ed25519 identity keypair");
28   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
29 }






Referenced by acds_main(), and
    discovery_session_create().






asciichat_error_t
  acds_identity_load (const char * path, uint8_t public_key[32], uint8_t
  secret_key[64])


Definition at line 31 of file identity.c.


31                                                                                                        {
32   if (!path || !public_key || !secret_key) {
33     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "path, public_key, and secret_key cannot be NULL");
34   }
35 
36   // Open file for reading
37   FILE *fp = platform_fopen("file_stream", path, "rb");
38   if (!fp) {
39     if (errno == ENOENT) {
40       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Identity file does not exist: %s", path);
41     }
42     return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to open identity file: %s", path);
43   }
44 
45   // Read secret key (64 bytes)
46   size_t read = fread(secret_key, 1, 64, fp);
47   if (read != 64) {
48     fclose(fp);
49     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Identity file corrupted (expected 64 bytes, got %zu): %s", read, path);
50   }
51 
52   // Extract public key from secret key (last 32 bytes of Ed25519 secret key)
53   memcpy(public_key, secret_key + 32, 32);
54 
55   fclose(fp);
56   log_info("Loaded identity from %s", path);
57   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
58 }






References platform_fopen().


Referenced by acds_main(), and
    discovery_session_create().






asciichat_error_t
  acds_identity_save (const char * path, const uint8_t public_key[32], const
  uint8_t secret_key[64])


Definition at line 60 of file identity.c.


60                                                                                                                    {
61   if (!path || !public_key || !secret_key) {
62     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "path, public_key, and secret_key cannot be NULL");
63   }
64 
65   // Extract directory path and create all parent directories
66   char dir_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH];
67   SAFE_STRNCPY(dir_path, path, sizeof(dir_path));
68 
69   // Find last directory separator
70   char *last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '/');
71   if (!last_sep) {
72     last_sep = strrchr(dir_path, '\\');
73   }
74 
75   if (last_sep) {
76     *last_sep = '\0';
77 
78     // Create directory recursively (mkdir -p equivalent)
79     asciichat_error_t result = platform_mkdir_recursive(dir_path, 0700);
80     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
81       return result;
82     }
83   }
84 
85   // Open file for writing (mode 0600 = owner read/write only)
86   int fd = platform_open("identity_file", path, O_WRONLY | O_CREAT | O_TRUNC, 0600);
87   if (fd < 0) {
88     return SET_ERRNO_SYS(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to create identity file: %s", path);
89   }
90 
91   // Write secret key (64 bytes)
92   ssize_t written = write(fd, secret_key, 64);
93   close(fd);
94 
95   if (written != 64) {
96     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CONFIG, "Failed to write identity file (wrote %zd/64 bytes): %s", written, path);
97   }
98 
99   log_info("Saved identity to %s", path);
100   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
101 }






References PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH,
    platform_mkdir_recursive(), and platform_open().


Referenced by acds_main(), and
    discovery_session_create().
